AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT TRACE MAIORINO'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled with ten days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleged breach of contract and negligence claims to withstand a general demurrer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
